case_title: JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. NAI SAECHAO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAECHAO, NAI C. $678.07 PRINCIPAL, $258.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $936.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100027803)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $462.57 (TRANSACTION ID # 100027803) AS TO DEFENDANT SAECHAO, NAI C.
DECLARATION RE: 1. COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033 2. WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100027803) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100060441): GOODMAN, JOHN M SUBSTITUTED FOR HONG, ANGIE C AS ATTORNEY FOR JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100023429), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC SERVED AUG-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAECHAO, NAI C.
DECLARATION OF PHIL DELANY IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. (TRANSACTION ID # 100027803) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SAECHAO, NAI C. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-16-2018
